source.name: Convoker by Niall Keegan
source.author: Niall Keegan
source.description:
Want to play a Conjurer in 2024 5e? Don't want to wait for WotC to release one officially? (Misty) Step right this way please.
Features of the Convoker Wizard include:
• Conjuration Savant: The staple feature of most Wizard subclasses gets an upgrade to let you summon any of your spellbooks into your hand as a Magic Action. • Consummate Convoker: Why should Warlocks get all the Find Familiar enhancements? Your familiar can now take the form of an Homunculus or a Mephit! You also get some free castings of Misty Step, which will come in handy with your next feature... • Misty Fling:... which lets you cast Misty Step at Touch Range, even on unwilling creatures if they fail a Charisma save. • Extraplanar Bond: Not only is your concentration on Conjuration summoning spells now damage-proof, you can also borrow your summons' senses (and cast Touch-range spells through them) as if they were your familiar. • Dimensional Mastery: Misty Step enemies and allies from up to 30 feet away, and send 'em twice as far when you do.
